title: lycaste colleyi
intro: Lycaste colleyi, also known as the 'Pansy Orchid', is a species of orchid native to Central America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, derived from its roots and flowers. The health benefits of Lycaste colleyi include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for herbal use through decoctions or infusions, where the roots and flowers are steeped in hot water to create a medicinal tea.
